languages.text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} представляться кучке разбойников, возомнивших себя гвардейцами!"
"I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws playing at being Guardsmen!"
languages.original_text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} представляться кучке разбойников, возомнивших себя гвардейцами!"

traits.locale_text: "I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws, playing at being Guardsmen!"

languages.text: "Ich denke nicht daran, mich einer Horde Gesetzloser vorzustellen, die Wachen spielen!"
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws playing at being Guardsmen!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich denke nicht daran, mich einer Horde Gesetzloser vorzustellen, die Wachen spielen!"

languages.text: « Je n'ai aucune intention de décliner mon identité devant une bande de hors-la-loi qui jouent aux gendarmes ! »
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws playing at being Guardsmen!"

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai aucune intention de décliner mon identité devant une bande de hors-la-loi qui jouent aux gendarmes ! »

languages.text: «¡No tengo intención de identificarme ante un puñado de forajidos haciéndose pasar por Guardia Imperial!».
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws playing at being Guardsmen!"

traits.locale_text: «¡No tengo intención de identificarme ante un puñado de forajidos haciéndose pasar por Guardia Imperial!».

languages.text: "Muhafızcılık oynayan bir grup kanunsuza kendimi tanıtmak gibi bir niyetim yok!"
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws playing at being Guardsmen!"

traits.locale_text: "Muhafızcılık oynayan bir grup kanunsuza kendimi tanıtmak gibi bir niyetim yok!"

languages.text: “我无意向一群冒充帝国卫兵的亡命之徒自报身份！”
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws playing at being Guardsmen!"

traits.locale_text: “我无意向一群冒充帝国卫兵的亡命之徒自报身份！”

languages.text: 「俺が警備隊員を装うならず者どもに身元を明かすつもりはない！」
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of identifying myself to a pack of outlaws playing at being Guardsmen!"

traits.locale_text: 「俺が警備隊員を装うならず者どもに身元を明かすつもりはない！」
